calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant San Francisco Unified School Districts Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Continued To Sep-09-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-02-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Continued To Jul-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to the sole cause of action in plaintiff Maria Olla's complaint is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend. Ms. Olla is granted leave to plead separate causes of action for disability discrimination, failure to accommodate disability, and failure to engage in the interactive process with more particularity. (Government Code 12940(a), (m), and (n).) Ms. Olla should allege facts regarding the nature of her mental disability, how it limits a major life activity, and SFUSD's awareness of her disability. Ms. Olla also has leave to clarify that the adverse employment actions were SFUSD's failure to provide her with a position in July 2016 and subsequently medically separating her. Ms. Olla should remove her allegations relating to October 2011 as she acknowledges that the conduct is not a basis for liability.

Written order is signed and filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
